evals.prompt: Write a 2000-word blog post about sustainable coffee packaging for an eco-friendly coffee brand called GreenBean
evals.expected_output: A complete 10-phase pipeline execution producing a fact-checked, brand-compliant, SEO-optimized article with inline citations

assertions.text: Pipeline executes all 10 phases in correct order (Research → Fact Check → Draft → Visual → Validate → Structure → SEO → Humanize → Review → Output)
Output includes inline citations from verified sources with URLs
SEO metadata is present: title tag, meta description, schema markup suggestions
No hallucinated statistics — all data points have source attribution
Reviewer score is 7.0 or above across all 5 dimensions

evals.prompt: Create a whitepaper on AI-powered clinical trial recruitment for a pharma company
evals.expected_output: A fact-checked whitepaper with industry knowledge pack calibration (pharma), domain-specific validation, visual asset annotations, and strict evidence standards

assertions.text: Industry knowledge pack (pharma) is loaded and SME calibration is applied in Phase 3
Domain-specific validation in Phase 4 checks regulatory compliance and terminology accuracy
Visual Asset Annotator (Phase 3.5) generates chart specifications from verified data
Content uses appropriate pharma terminology without oversimplification

evals.prompt: Write an FAQ page about home loan refinancing for a financial services brand
evals.expected_output: A structured FAQ with verified financial data, regulatory compliance (BFSI knowledge pack), and appropriate disclaimers

assertions.text: BFSI industry knowledge pack is loaded for financial content calibration
FAQ schema markup is included in SEO output
Financial disclaimers are present where required
All interest rates and financial figures cite authoritative sources

evals.name: Phase 7 Scoring Dimension Test
evals.prompt: Create a blog post about 'Remote Work Productivity Tips' for brand 'TechStartup' (technology industry, conversational tone). Verify the Phase 7 scoring output.
evals.expected_output: Phase 7 produces a Quality Scorecard with all 5 dimensions scored 1-10, composite score calculated as weighted average, and pass/fail decision based on 7.0 threshold.

assertions.text: Quality Scorecard includes all 5 dimensions: Content Quality, Citation Integrity, Brand Compliance, SEO Performance, Readability
Composite score equals weighted average: (CQ×0.30 + CI×0.25 + BC×0.20 + SEO×0.15 + R×0.10) rounded to 1 decimal
Each dimension score is between 1.0 and 10.0
Decision is APPROVED if composite ≥7.0 and all dimension minimums met

evals.name: Empty Guardrails Compliance Test
evals.prompt: Create a blog post about 'Best Investment Strategies 2026' for a BFSI brand with EMPTY guardrails (no prohibited_claims, no required_disclaimers). Verify the system warns about missing guardrails.
evals.expected_output: System warns that guardrails are empty before starting pipeline. Phase 5 reports compliance as SKIPPED (not PASSED). Phase 7 applies -1.0 penalty to Brand Compliance.

assertions.text: Pre-flight validation warns: guardrails empty for regulated industry
Phase 5 Brand Compliance reports 'skipped_empty_guardrails' status, NOT 'passed'
Phase 7 Brand Compliance score includes penalty for empty guardrails
Final output includes guardrails status in pipeline performance section

evals.name: Title Curation with Brand Personality Test
evals.prompt: Create an article about 'AI in Supply Chain Management' for brand 'LogiCorp' (witty personality, conversational tone, B2B SaaS industry). Verify title curation adapts to brand voice.
evals.expected_output: Title curation generates 4-5 options using article-specific angles (not generic blog angles), adapted to witty/conversational brand personality. Titles checked against SERP competitors.

assertions.text: Title options use article-specific angles (Authority, Analysis, Problem-Solution, Future-focused, Expert perspective)
Title language reflects witty/conversational brand personality (casual language, clever framing)
Competitor titles from SERP shown alongside options for differentiation
Each title shows character count and stays ≤60 characters (SERP safe)
User must explicitly select or modify a title before Phase 1 begins
